accepted.reason: Local Tailwind CSS dependency for the current public/index.html SPA entry; not a business-code split target.
evidence: public/index.html loads tailwind.min.css with a relative stylesheet link
app/view admin pages use CDN Tailwind links and do not depend on this local file
accepted.review_after: Revisit when the public SPA is split or migrated away from the current Vue CDN runtime.
